---
title: "Bloomberg.com"
page-layout: article
---

# Bloomberg.com

**Provider:** Bloomberg

## Description

News and data platform covering global markets, business, economics, politics, technology, and policy. Supports research on current events, financial markets, and business trends.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy, News & Media
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events, Real Estate & Property Data
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events, Real Estate & Property Data

## Access notes

Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address.Bloomberg.com accounts are reset annually after the spring semester. Returning users may need to re-register with their @yale.edu address at that time.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://web.library.yale.edu/access-bloombergcom)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
